modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need help updating cell phone number for faculty/staff.

full_description_text:  
So, I was on the phone with this employee, right? They were trying to figure out how to change their cell phone number, but it was kinda confusing for them. They just wanted to make sure their info was up to date, you know?
short_description: Need help updating cell phone number for faculty/staff.
description: So, I was on the phone with this employee, right? They were trying to figure out how to change their cell phone number, but it was kinda confusing for them. They just wanted to make sure their info was up to date, you know?
